extortion.description: LA VOIE EXPRESS offers comprehensive logistics services including messaging, transport, e-commerce solutions, and warehousing. The company focuses on improving client competitiveness by ensuring safe, timely, and cost-effective delivery of goods. It serves a wide range of clients, providing tailored logistics solutions to meet their specific needs. With a network of regional agencies, LA VOIE EXPRESS emphasizes flexibility and responsiveness to varying demands while maintaining high service quality.company is headquartered in 19, Rue Abou Bakr Ibnou Koutia, Oukacha, Aïn Sebaâ, Casablanca, Morocco.145 Employees
